# Clippy: First Blood

> A retro SNES-style run and gun browser game featuring the iconic Microsoft Office assistant Clippy as an action hero.

## About

Clippy: First Blood is a free-to-play browser game that transforms Microsoft's infamous Office assistant into a pixel art action hero. The game pays homage to classic SNES run-and-gun titles like Contra and Metal Slug, featuring side-scrolling gameplay with shooting mechanics.

## Game Features

- SNES-style pixel art graphics with CRT screen effect
- Run and gun gameplay mechanics
- Multiple player states: running, jumping, crouching, prone
- 8-directional aiming system
- Shooting while moving and in air
- Cover system for tactical gameplay
- Nostalgic retro aesthetic

## Controls

- Movement: Arrow Keys or WASD
- Jump: Space or Z
- Shoot: X or Ctrl
- Lock Aim: Hold Shift
- Take Cover: C (when near cover)
- Go Prone: Double-tap Down

## Technical Details

- Built with vanilla JavaScript and HTML5 Canvas
- 256x224 native resolution (SNES resolution)
- 3x upscaled display (768x672)
- No installation required - plays in any modern browser
- Responsive controls optimized for keyboard input

## Play Now

Visit https://clippy-first-blood.vercel.app/ to play for free.

## Keywords

browser game, retro game, SNES game, pixel art, run and gun, Clippy, Microsoft Office, action game, free game, HTML5 game, JavaScript game, nostalgic, 16-bit style
